description: Controlled by IT pros and loved by business users, Devolutions Password Hub is a secure and cloud-based password manager for teams. It empowers your organization to easily and securely vault and manage business-user passwords, along with other sensitive information, through a user-friendly web interface that can be quickly, easily and securely accessed via any browser. Simply put, Devolutions Password Hub is the perfect balance of security and usability.
summary: Devolutions Password Hub is a secure and cloud-based password manager for teams.
author: Devolutions inc.
